question1: ID: SINGLE_061      Based on the topology below, calculate the COMPLETE ROUTING TABLE for HA, R1, HB.      Use the format: NETWORK PREFIX | GATEWAY | INTERFACE. You can leave unused rows blank.   	* Please fill each device in its own routing table: [HA], [R1], [HB] (or more, depending on topology).   	* Use 0.0.0.0/0 for the default network prefix.   	* Use * for directly connected networks.   	* Use ETHX for the interface name.
